ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISCHANGED(Primary_Use_Case__c), ISCHANGED(Secondary_Use_Case__c) ), OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c , 'Active'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c , 'Cancelled'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c , 'Part Of Another Subscription') ), $UserRole.DeveloperName <> 'Product_Marketing_Strategy', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You do not have permissions to edit Solution fields.
